name: Paycheck cashing and payday
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers check cashing, payday loans, and money services at physical locations. No bank account required for check cashing with valid government ID.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating physical retail locations across the United States, including a Los Angeles location at 1009 W MLK Blvd. The company provides check cashing as its core service alongside short-term payday loans and various money management products. The Los Angeles store operates Monday through Saturday with extended hours (9 AM–7 PM weekdays, 9 AM–5 PM Saturday), positioning itself as an accessible financial service point for consumers without traditional bank accounts. ACE has expanded beyond basic check cashing to offer a broader suite of financial products, including prepaid banking solutions and money transfer services through partnerships with established providers like MoneyGram and Pathward National Association. The company accepts most check types and requires only a valid government-issued ID for check cashing, making the barrier to entry low for underbanked consumers. ACE's service offerings also include bill payment, money orders, ATM access, tax services, and personal loans, positioning the company as a one-stop financial services hub for consumers seeking alternatives to traditional banking. What distinguishes ACE is the integration of digital and physical services—customers can apply for payday loans online or in-store, and the company offers mobile banking apps (Porte) alongside in-person support. The company also provides prepaid debit card products (ACE Elite Visa) and online banking accounts (Flare Account) in partnership with Pathward, N.A., blending traditional payday lending with modern fintech banking solutions. However, like all payday lenders, ACE's short-term loan products carry significant costs and risks. Payday loans are designed for borrowers to repay in full on their next paycheck, creating potential debt cycles for consumers who cannot immediately repay. The $100–$255 loan range and short repayment terms mean annualized interest rates are typically very high, though specific APR rates are not disclosed on the location page. Consumers should carefully consider whether payday loans align with their financial situation, as repeated rollovers or extensions can lead to compounding debt. The company does comply with California state regulations and provides a Notice at Collection disclosure, indicating regulatory adherence.
address: 1260 S Soto St, Los Angeles, CA 90023

company_info.headquarters: 1260 S Soto St, Los Angeles, CA 90023

pros: No bank account required for check cashing—only valid government-issued ID needed
Extended weekday hours (9 AM–7 PM Monday–Friday) and Saturday availability for working consumers
Multiple service offerings under one roof: check cashing, bill pay, money transfers, money orders, and ATM access
Online payday loan application option available in addition to in-store applications
Partnership with MoneyGram for domestic and international money transfers to 200+ countries and territories
Mobile banking app (Porte) with full-service features and in-person support at locations
Offers prepaid debit cards and online banking accounts through FDIC-insured Pathward partnership
cons: Payday loans carry very high annualized interest rates typical of the industry, creating debt cycle risk
Specific APR and fee information for payday loans not disclosed on the location page, requiring separate inquiry
Short-term repayment structure (generally one paycheck cycle) difficult for consumers with irregular income
Limited loan amount range ($100–$255) may be insufficient for larger unexpected expenses
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing without a bank account
Workers with irregular income seeking bill payment and money transfer services in one location
Consumers facing small, immediate cash needs who can repay within one pay period
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for unbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing or bill payment services without a traditional bank account. The primary caveat is that payday loans, while available, carry high annualized costs and are designed only for single-paycheck repayment cycles—consumers should explore alternatives before committing to this debt product.
services: Check cashing (most check types, no bank account required)
Porte mobile banking account with full-service features
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
